---
title: "Leslie William Spratt"
---

## Leslie William Spratt

**Dates:** 1849/50-1925

### Description

brother of Emmeline Spratt

### Biography

Nephew of CMY\'s maid Harriet Spratt, he was a chorister at Winchester College.  In the 1871 census he was working as a shop assistant in a large shop in the Edgware Road in London;  by 1891 he was a draper on his own account.

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 22d 1878[[footnote:1]]
- Letter from [1878?]
- Letter from June 5th 1877 
- Letter from Decr 31st [1872]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
